segments.text: I exhort therefore, that, first of all, supplications, prayers, intercessions, and giving of thanks, be made for all men
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For kings, and for all that are in authority; that we may lead a quiet and peaceable life in all godliness and honesty
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For this is good and acceptable
in the sight of God our Saviour
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Who will have all men to be saved, and to come unto the knowledge of the truth
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: one God, and one mediator between God and men, the man Christ Jesus
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Who gave himself a ransom for all, to be testified in due time
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: a preacher, and an apostle, I speak the truth in Christ, and lie not; a teacher of the Gentiles in faith and verity
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: I will therefore that men pray every where, lifting up holy hands, without wrath and doubting
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: In like manner also, that women adorn themselves in modest apparel, with shamefacedness and sobriety; not with broided hair, or gold, or pearls, or costly array
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: But which becometh women professing godliness with good works
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Let the woman learn in silence with all subjection
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: But I suffer not a woman to teach, nor to usurp authority over the man, but to be in silence
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For Adam was first formed, then Eve
And Adam was not deceived, but the woman being deceived was in the transgression
Notwithstanding she shall be saved in childbearing, if they continue in faith and charity and holiness with sobriety
segments.speaker: Paul
